title: OAVs Bhadrak Support Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Warden, Head Cook and More Posts
post_name: Support Staff (Warden, Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper, Head Cook, Assistant Cook)
short_info: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Bhadrak has released the official Support Staff (Warden, Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper, Head Cook, Assistant Cook) Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 02/2026 at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Official Website. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced under the OAVs Bhadrak Support Staff Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 to 60 years with qualifications such as HSC, B.A/B.Sc, and relevant experience can apply offline up to 10 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Warden: Minimum Age 30 years, Maximum Age 60 years. Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: Minimum Age 21 years, Maximum Age 32 years. Head Cook: Minimum Age 30 years, Maximum Age 40 years. Assistant Cook: Minimum Age 21 years, Maximum Age 32 years.

qualification.details: Warden: B.A / B.Sc from any recognized University. Male for Boys' hostel and Female for Girls' hostel. At least 02 years in hostel management. Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: Must have passed HSC Examination. Male Only. Head Cook: Male for Boys' hostel and Female for Girls' hostel. Trained in cookery preferred. Assistant Cook: Male for Boys' hostel and Female for Girls' hostel. Having experience in cooking and other characteristics as specified for Head Cook.

salary_details.details: Warden: Rs. 21,175/- per month Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: Rs. 7,500/- per month Head Cook: Rs. 9,000/- per month Assistant Cook: Rs. 6750/- per month

selection_process: Application submission by registered post Verification of documents Interview/Selection by respective School Level Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://bhadrak.odisha.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
